title: Diamond Boron Missile Defense
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Boron}}
[[File:DiamondBoronSatellite-FOC.png|thumb|right|A Diamond Boron Missile Satellite]]
The '''Diamond Boron Missile Satellite''' was a defense satellite used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]]. Similar to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] Missile Turrets, the Satellite was modified to support [[Diamond boron missile]]s.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
